title: Italian Hake Pasta
description: A light and flavorful Italian-inspired pasta dish featuring pan-seared hake and kombu-infused broth.
instructions: 1. Cut the kombu into smaller pieces and soak in water for 30 minutes.
2. Cut the hake fillets into 120g portions.
3. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to package instructions.
4. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and sauté the garlic until fragrant.
5. Add the hake to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until cooked through.
6. Remove the hake from the skillet and set aside.
7. Add the kombu to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
8. Stir in the dressed and bring the mixture to a simmer.
9. Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss with the kombu-infused broth.
10. Serve the pasta with the pan-seared hake on top.
